segments.scene_description: A static view of a grand gothic dining hall illuminated by natural light streaming through tall arched windows. A massive dragon skeleton hangs suspended from the vaulted ceiling above long wooden tables where several individuals are seated. The stone architecture features wooden roof trusses and a spiral staircase visible in the background corner.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, sweeping view of a grand gothic dining hall where natural light defines the scale of a medieval fantasy interior. It begins by capturing the vastness of the vaulted stone ceiling and the wooden roof trusses that frame the upper reaches of the room. The perspective then settles on the massive dragon skeleton suspended centrally above long wooden tables where several individuals are seated. Finally, the gaze expands to encompass the surrounding architecture, revealing tall arched windows streaming with light and a spiral staircase tucked into the background corner.
